How to Play

  1. Click PLAY and enter your nickname.
  2. Read the weather or place question.
  3. Choose exactly 2 clothing items.
  4. Click CHECK.
  5. If correct, you get 1 point. If wrong, you will see a helpful hint and move to the next question.
  6. The leaderboard shows your total correct answers.
